scripts.build:dev: cross-env APP_MODE=development NODE_ENV=production turbo run build
scripts.build:staging: cross-env APP_MODE=staging NODE_ENV=production turbo run build
scripts.build:prod: cross-env APP_MODE=production NODE_ENV=production turbo run build
scripts.preview:dev: cross-env APP_MODE=development NODE_ENV=production turbo run preview
scripts.preview:staging: cross-env APP_MODE=staging NODE_ENV=production turbo run preview
scripts.preview:prod: cross-env APP_MODE=production NODE_ENV=production turbo run preview
scripts.dev: cross-env APP_MODE=development NODE_ENV=development turbo run dev
scripts.dev:staging: cross-env APP_MODE=staging NODE_ENV=development turbo run dev
scripts.dev:prod: cross-env APP_MODE=production NODE_ENV=development turbo run dev
